sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106390" key="u(drobafh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδρο-βᾰφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n106390.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dipped in water,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.56</biblScope> </bibl> (v. l.):—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδρό-βᾰφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype><cit TEIform="cit"><quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">, Μους.Σμυρν.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1878p.93" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1878p.93</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
